name: Colima (Container Runtimes on macOS/Linux)

performance.notes: Faster than Docker Desktop on Mac; slower than OrbStack

agent_readiness.notes: Free Docker Desktop replacement using Lima VMs. colima start. colima start --cpu 4 --memory 8. Docker and containerd runtimes. colima start --runtime containerd (for nerdctl). Kubernetes: colima start --kubernetes. Apple Silicon native. colima status / colima stop. DOCKER_HOST=$HOME/.colima/default/docker.sock. Multiple profiles: colima start k8s --kubernetes. Virtiofs for fast file sharing. Widely used CI-compatible free alternative to Docker Desktop.

gotchas: DOCKER_HOST env var sometimes needed for non-default socket path
File sharing slower than OrbStack's virtiofs implementation
Kubernetes requires colima restart with --kubernetes flag
Lima dependency means indirect configuration complexity
best_when: Free Docker Desktop replacement for Mac (no cost vs OrbStack Pro)
CI environments requiring open-source only tooling
avoid_when: When OrbStack's performance and polish worth the Pro cost
summary: Colima is the free open-source Docker Desktop replacement for macOS. colima start (starts Lima VM with Docker daemon). Supports Docker and containerd runtimes, Kubernetes, multiple profiles, Apple Silicon. DOCKER_HOST socket compatible with all Docker tools. Slower than OrbStack but completely free and open-source. CI/CD compatible Docker environment for Mac.
